headline: Paris municipal elections: Three candidates head to the second round following Sarah Knafo's withdrawal
subhead: Socialist Emmanuel Grégoire has refused any alliance with radical left LFI candidate Sophia Chikirou, leading Chikirou to remain in the three-way runoff with Rachida Dati, who stands alone on the right.

headline: 'For sale, 5-year-old child, docile and calm': Yazidi genocide trial dives into horrors of IS
subhead: The Paris criminal court heard the harrowing reality of the enslavement of a people in the name of religion. Rarely has a terrorism trial gone so far in exposing the atrocities perpetrated by jihadists.

headline: Shahed drones, the symbol of Russia-Iran cooperation
subhead: Exported from Iran to Russia and then locally produced under license, the suicide drone has been enhanced with Russian navigation and jamming technologies, similar to some missiles used by Iran in the war launched by the US and Israel.

headline: War in Iran: 'Spain's resolve stands in stark contrast to France's stance, which seems more accepting of US-Israeli strikes'
subhead: Historian Laurence Badel analyzes the reasons behind the Spanish government's 'no to war' position and the impact of this decision on the European diplomatic landscape.

headline: Rosalía launches her world tour in Lyon
subhead: The Spanish pop star kicked off her Lux World Tour on Monday at the LDLC Arena, on the outskirts of Lyon, in a whirlwind of style, language and religious imagery.

Five takeaways from the first round of French local elections
subhead: The 2026 municipal elections have already concluded in the vast majority of French towns, with a mayor being directly elected in the first round. In larger cities, however, the right and the Socialists are in the lead for the second round.

headline: French local elections: First-round results give sense of political landscape one year before presidential vote
subhead: With blurred lines between the right and far right, rivalry between the radical left and the Socialists and the fading of the presidential party, the period between the two rounds of the municipal vote is a testing ground for political power balances ahead of the 2027 election.

headline: French municipal elections: See the first-round results on our map
subhead: Follow the 2026 municipal elections' first-round results in real time with our interactive map, and see which lists are in the lead and which mayors have been directly elected.
